setup_commands.github: claude-workspace mcp remote https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/ --name github --scope user
setup_commands.github_pat: claude-workspace mcp remote https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/ --name github --scope user --bearer
setup_commands.notion: claude-workspace mcp remote https://mcp.notion.com/mcp --name notion --scope user
setup_commands.linear: claude-workspace mcp remote https://mcp.linear.app/sse --name linear --scope user
setup_commands.jira: claude-workspace mcp add jira --scope user --api-key JIRA_API_TOKEN -- npx -y @anthropic/claude-code-jira-server

notes.github: Recommended scope: user (personal OAuth credentials, used across all projects). Uses OAuth - authenticate via /mcp in Claude Code after adding
notes.github_pat: Recommended scope: user (personal access token). Uses PAT - you will be prompted to enter your GitHub Personal Access Token securely
notes.notion: Recommended scope: user (personal Notion workspace access). Uses OAuth - authenticate via /mcp in Claude Code after adding
notes.linear: Recommended scope: user (personal Linear credentials). Uses OAuth - authenticate via /mcp in Claude Code after adding
notes.jira: Recommended scope: user (personal API token, JIRA_URL and JIRA_EMAIL are environment variables). You will be prompted to enter JIRA_API_TOKEN securely. Also set JIRA_URL and JIRA_EMAIL env vars.
